# mdpad

> A fast, beautiful markdown reader and editor for the terminal: renders
> headings, adaptive tables, highlighted code; mouse selection with
> clipboard copy (local and SSH); built-in editing; behaves in pipes.
> Single static binary for Linux, macOS and Windows.

Install: `cargo install mdpad`, or prebuilt binaries from
https://github.com/lpalbou/mdpad/releases/latest. Run `mdpad FILE.md`
(viewer) or `mdpad --print FILE.md` (stdout). Full docs are published at
https://lpalbou.github.io/mdpad.

## Core Docs

- [README.md](README.md): project overview, highlights, quick start, doc map
- [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md): install per platform, first run, first edit, pipes
- [docs/api.md](docs/api.md): canonical CLI reference — flags, viewer/editor keys, environment variables, exit behavior
- [docs/clipboard.md](docs/clipboard.md): mouse selection, copy-on-release, native + OSC 52 clipboard channels, terminal support matrix
- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): components, invariants (one rendered line = one terminal row), design decisions, mode state machine
- [docs/rendering.md](docs/rendering.md): data flow and the staged table-sizing algorithm
- [docs/faq.md](docs/faq.md): common questions — Cmd+C on macOS, SSH copying, record-mode tables, supported markdown dialect
- [docs/troubleshooting.md](docs/troubleshooting.md): symptom-oriented fixes — clipboard, colors, glyphs, terminal state

## Contributing

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): setup, test/lint gates, PR and docs workflow
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): private vulnerability reporting, hardening scope

## Optional

- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): release history
- [ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md](ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md): upstream dependencies and prior art
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): community expectations
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): documentation index
